canonical_answer: A cartoon woman with blonde hair and a light blue top mixes green salad in a large glass bowl using wooden utensils. Two red tomatoes and glass bottles containing yellow and white liquids rest on the light purple table surface beside the bowl. Text overlays discussing protein and diet appear on the left while a website URL stays visible in the top left corner throughout the scene.

question: Describe what is happening in the later part of the scene regarding the vegetables.
canonical_answer: Illustrations of various vegetables including spinach, peas, corn, and potatoes appear alongside nutritional information text blocks. The screen displays a title reading '9 High Protein Vegetables' with specific details about protein content per serving for spinach and peas. A cartoon woman eats from a plate of colorful vegetables before the focus shifts to individual vegetable graphics with accompanying beige and green text blocks describing preparation methods.

question: Describe the sequence of visual elements and actions shown from the beginning to the end of the clip.
canonical_answer: At 0s, light blue text displays diet program information on a white background; at 4s, a cartoon woman wearing a blue shirt appears holding utensils over a glass bowl; at 10s, a small bottle containing white liquid appears on the purple table surface; at 18s, the woman actively mixes the green salad leaves with wooden utensils while health benefit text displays.

question: Describe the changing text overlays and their specific messages as the video progresses.
canonical_answer: At 4s, text overlay states people do not have to always eat meat for protein; at 8s, yellow font explains there are vegetables that you can eat besides meat; at 10s, captions describe getting the right amount of protein to help lose weight faster; at 18s, text lists reduced risks of diabetes, heart disease and cancers.
